name: Obsidian LiveSync
description: Syncs your agent's workspace with an Obsidian vault using the Setup URI and Passphrase. Includes multi-agent ACL by scope (000-099 = Raul, 100+ = Sky).
author: Raul

setup_uri.description: The 'obsidian://setuplivesync?settings=...' URI from Obsidian LiveSync plugin settings. Must contain pbkdf2_salts.

agentId.description: Agent identifier for ACL scope validation. Defaults to 'sky'. Examples: 'sky', 'raul', 'shared'

tools.name: obsidian_sync_file
tools.description: Syncs a local file from the workspace to the Obsidian vault in CouchDB. Enforces ACL by agent scope. Includes automatic conflict detection and versioning.

filePath.description: Relative path of the file in the workspace (e.g., '100.Sky/memory/notes.md'). Must match agent's allowed scope.

tools.name: obsidian_pull_vault
tools.description: Downloads and reconstructs the entire Obsidian vault from CouchDB to the local workspace. Only writes files matching the agent's scope.

tools.name: getAuditLog
tools.description: Retrieves the sync audit log for debugging and monitoring.

tools.name: getVersionHistory
tools.description: Get version history and conflict metadata for a file.

tools.name: revertToVersion
tools.description: Revert a file to a previous version. Enforces ACL.

tools.name: setConflictStrategy
tools.description: Set the conflict resolution strategy: 'last-write-wins', 'remote-wins', 'local-wins', or 'keep-both'.

tools.name: getWatcherStatus
tools.description: Get status of the automatic file watcher and pending changes.

tools.name: getNextSyncBatch
tools.description: P2: Get next batch of files to sync (incremental sync). Returns files that have changed since last sync.

tools.name: syncBatch
tools.description: P2: Sync a batch of files in one operation. Efficient for bulk uploads.

files.description: Array of file paths to sync

tools.name: mergeConflict
tools.description: P2: Intelligently merge conflicting versions. Supports text, JSON, and Markdown with auto-detection.

tools.name: getSchedules
tools.description: P2: Get list of all sync schedules.

tools.name: addSchedule
tools.description: P2: Add a new sync schedule (interval or cron-based).

tools.name: setScheduleEnabled
tools.description: P2: Enable or disable a schedule.

tools.name: triggerSchedule
tools.description: P2: Manually trigger a scheduled sync immediately.

tools.name: getIncrementalSyncStats
tools.description: P2: Get statistics about incremental sync.

tools.name: resetIncrementalSyncTracking
tools.description: P2: Reset incremental sync tracking (force full sync on next batch).

p0_improvements: ✅ Salt extraction: Now dynamically extracted from setup_uri (no hardcoded values)
✅ Multi-agent ACL: Scope-based access control (000-099 vs 100+)
✅ Structured logging: Audit trail with timestamps, actions, paths, and scope info
p1_improvements: ✅ File watcher: Automatic sync on file changes (optional, configurable)
✅ Retry logic: Exponential backoff for transient network failures
✅ Conflict detection: Automatic conflict resolution with multiple strategies
✅ Versioning: Full version history with revert capabilities
✅ Test suite: Basic tests for retry, conflict resolution, and versioning
✅ New tools: getVersionHistory(), revertToVersion(), setConflictStrategy(), getWatcherStatus()
p2_improvements: ✅ Intelligent merge strategies: 3-way merge, Markdown-aware, JSON-aware
✅ Auto-merge on conflict detection: Resolve conflicts without manual intervention
✅ Incremental sync: Only sync changed files (huge performance boost)
✅ Sync scheduling: Interval-based and cron-based scheduled syncs
✅ Batch sync operations: Efficient bulk file uploads
✅ New tools: getNextSyncBatch(), syncBatch(), mergeConflict(), addSchedule(), triggerSchedule(), etc.

scopes.000-099: Raul (personal workspace: INBOX, JOURNAL, ACTION, etc.)
scopes.100-199: Sky (agent memory: journal, memory, analysis, etc.)
